creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 157539
Unified diff

** This update provides significant improvements to the condor port.

Update to latest stable release, canonicalize patch filenames, eliminate GCC dependency and MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE, replace files/condor_config.in with version-specific example file provided in the dist, move sample files to etc/*.sample, improvements to condor_config.local.sample and condor-config script, make rc script more reliable by replacing fixed sleep delays with more intelligent wait loops.
